name: CHANGELOG kill_worker fast-path entry
goal: Document the already-staged kill_worker directive fast-path in the v1.0.20 CHANGELOG so the release note matches what ships.

tasks.name: Add the kill_worker fast-path CHANGELOG bullet
tasks.description: No tests required: documentation-only. Append one bullet to the existing '### Added' block under '## 1.0.20' in CHANGELOG.md, after the Advisor Fallback bullet, describing the kill_worker directive_id fast-path (opt-in, backward-compatible, graceful-degrade) and its deliberate enforcement-relaxation caveat. The kill_worker code + tests are already staged (concurrent worker); this task adds only the release note. Verify version_consistency still green and stage.

steps.description: Append the kill_worker fast-path bullet to the ## 1.0.20 ### Added block (after the Advisor Fallback bullet)

steps.expected: ### Added has both the Advisor Fallback and kill_worker bullets, ahead of ### Changed
